post_copy_actions: Rename directory on disk from langchain-js to langchain during copy.
Update package.json repository to atomicstrata/atomicmemory with directory adapters/langchain.
Update package.json homepage and bugs URLs to the monorepo issue tracker.
Confirm @atomicmemory/sdk dependency uses a registry-safe semver range or a workspace: spec that pack rewrites cleanly.
Run npm pack --dry-run --json and reconcile the published file list against this allowlist.
notes: Source lives on the feat/integration-maturity-framework-adapters branch and is not yet on integrations main. If the branch lands on main before the copy is executed, update source_ref to main and re-pin source_commit accordingly. Directory rename normalizes adapter path to match the unscoped package name; package name @atomicmemory/langchain is unchanged.
